title: PDP Decision Envelope
description: Platform-level schema for the output of a Policy Decision Point evaluation. See docs/pdp-decision-envelope.md for field semantics and design rationale.

decision_id.description: Unique identifier for this decision. Recommended: UUID or equivalent globally-unique string.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the decision was produced.

input_summary.description: Brief summary of the input that triggered this decision. Should be concise but traceable to the original input.

intent_result.description: Interaction intent classification result. See intent-classification-result.schema.json for full schema.

gate_decision.description: Gate decision result. See gate-decision-result.schema.json for full schema.

rationale.description: Human-readable explanation of why the current gate level and other decisions were chosen.

precedence_resolution.description: Rule precedence resolution result. See precedence-resolution-result.schema.json for full schema.

delegation_decision.description: Delegation decision result. See delegation-decision-result.schema.json for full schema.

escalation_decision.description: Escalation decision result. See escalation-decision-result.schema.json for full schema.
